info.title: Next Wiki API
info.description: OpenAPI specification for the Next Wiki REST API.

contentType.description: MIME type of the stored asset.

sizeBytes.description: Size of the asset in bytes.

url.description: URL to fetch the asset content.

markdown.description: Ready-to-paste Markdown image snippet referencing this asset.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the asset was created (ISO 8601).

contentType.description: MIME type of the uploaded asset.

sizeBytes.description: Size of the uploaded asset in bytes.

url.description: URL to fetch the uploaded asset content.

markdown.description: Ready-to-paste Markdown image snippet referencing the uploaded asset.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the asset was created (ISO 8601).

id.description: Author user identifier, or null when the author is not disclosed.

displayName.description: Author display name, or null when not available.

PublicAuthor.description: Public author identity visible to the caller.

title.description: Human-readable title for the draft revision.

contentSource.description: Markdown source of the draft revision.

baseRevisionId.description: Revision the draft is based on, for conflict detection. Omit to base on the latest revision.

baseContentHash.description: Expected content hash of the base revision, used for optimistic concurrency control.

PublicDraftCreateInput.description: Create a draft revision for an existing public page.

locale.description: Locale of the page content (e.g. "en"). Defaults to the workspace default.

contentSource.description: Markdown source of the initial page revision.

include.description: Comma-separated relations to include in the returned page resource: latestRevision, publishedRevision.

PublicPageIncludeQuery.description: Optional ?include= query parameter for endpoints returning a single PublicPageResource.

PublicPageIncludeValue.description: Optional page relation that can be requested via ?include=.

status.description: Filter pages by lifecycle state. Defaults to published.

q.description: Optional free-text query to filter pages by path or title.

path.description: Exact canonical path to look up a single page. When provided, returns at most one matching page and ignores other filters.

pathPrefix.description: Directory prefix to list all pages under a subtree (e.g. "docs" matches "docs/a", "docs/b", "docs"). Cannot be combined with path.

limit.description: Maximum number of pages to return per request (1-100). Defaults to 20.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous response.

order.description: Sort order: alphabetical by path, or most recently updated first. Defaults to path.

include.description: Comma-separated relations to include: latestRevision, publishedRevision. Omitted by default; fetch a specific revision via GET /pages/{id}/revisions/{version} instead.

items.description: Page resources for the current result window.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results, or null when there are no more.

PublicPagePath.description: Canonical wiki page path. Use lowercase slash-separated path segments.

baseRevisionId.description: Expected current revision id, used for optimistic concurrency control.

PublicPagePropertiesInput.description: Update page properties. Provide at least one of path or title.

spaceSlug.description: Slug of the wiki space the page belongs to.

contentSource.description: Markdown source of the current revision. Omitted from list/search results; present on single-page reads and writes.

status.description: Page lifecycle state: an unpublished draft, a published page, or a soft-deleted page.

latestRevision.description: Most recent revision of any status, or null if none exists. Omitted unless requested via ?include=latestRevision.

publishedRevision.description: Most recent published revision, or null if never published. Omitted unless requested via ?include=publishedRevision.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the page was created (ISO 8601).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the page was last updated (ISO 8601).

self.description: Canonical API URL of this page resource. Also the target for PATCH updates.

byPath.description: API URL to look up this page by its canonical path (GET /v1/pages?path=...).

revisions.description: API URL listing this page revisions.

drafts.description: API URL for creating draft revisions of this page.

links.description: Related API resource URLs for this page.

scope.description: Restrict matching to a field, or search across all fields. Defaults to all.

status.description: Filter results by page lifecycle state. Defaults to published.

pathPrefix.description: Directory prefix to restrict matching to pages under a subtree (e.g. "docs" matches "docs/a", "docs/b").

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return per request (1-100). Defaults to 20.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous response.

include.description: Comma-separated relations to include on each result page: latestRevision, publishedRevision.

excerptLength.description: Approximate number of characters of context to return around the matched keyword in excerpt (20-500). Defaults to 100.

createdStart.description: Only include pages created at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

createdEnd.description: Only include pages created at or before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

updatedStart.description: Only include pages last updated at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

updatedEnd.description: Only include pages last updated at or before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

items.description: Search results for the current result window.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results, or null when there are no more.

path.description: Full canonical path of this node (may be empty for the root).

segment.description: Last slash-separated segment of the path.

title.description: Page title when a page exists at this path, otherwise null.

pageId.description: Page id when a page exists at this path, otherwise null.

status.description: Page status when a page exists, otherwise null.

children.description: Child nodes ordered by path segment.

PublicPageTreeNode.description: A single node in the public wiki page directory tree.

status.description: Filter pages by lifecycle state. Defaults to published.

pathPrefix.description: Directory prefix to scope the tree to a subtree (e.g. "docs" returns only the docs/ branch).

root.description: Root node of the directory tree. When pathPrefix is set, this is the prefix node.

pageCount.description: Total number of visible pages represented in the tree.

PublicPageTreeResponse.description: Hierarchical directory structure of public wiki pages.

expectedRevisionId.description: Revision id the caller expects to publish, used for optimistic concurrency control.

status.description: Filter revisions by lifecycle state. Defaults to all.

limit.description: Maximum number of revisions to return per request (1-100). Defaults to 20.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous response.

items.description: Revision resources for the current result window.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results, or null when there are no more.

pageId.description: Identifier of the page this revision belongs to.

version.description: Monotonically increasing revision version, starting at 1.

status.description: Revision lifecycle state: an unpublished draft or a published revision.

contentType.description: Content media type of the revision body. Always text/markdown.

contentHash.description: Content hash of the Markdown source, used for optimistic concurrency control.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the revision was created (ISO 8601).

publishedAt.description: Timestamp when the revision was published (ISO 8601), or null if still a draft.

canPublish.description: Whether the current caller is allowed to publish this revision.

contentSource.description: Markdown source of the revision. Present only on GET /pages/{id}/revisions/{version}; omitted from the revision list.

pageId.description: Identifier of the page this revision belongs to.

version.description: Monotonically increasing revision version, starting at 1.

status.description: Revision lifecycle state: an unpublished draft or a published revision.

contentType.description: Content media type of the revision body. Always text/markdown.

contentHash.description: Content hash of the Markdown source, used for optimistic concurrency control.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the revision was created (ISO 8601).

publishedAt.description: Timestamp when the revision was published (ISO 8601), or null if still a draft.

canPublish.description: Whether the current caller is allowed to publish this revision.

matchType.description: Which field produced the match for this result.

excerpt.description: Snippet of contentSource centered on the matched keyword (~excerptLength characters), or null for path/title matches or when not applicable. The result page never includes the full contentSource.

score.description: Relevance score in (0, 1]. Path matches score highest, then title, then content (weighted by how many times the term appears). Results are sorted by score descending within each returned page; null is not currently produced.

Optimize selected Wiki Markdown @tag AI @auth bearer

Start semantic Wiki search @tag AI @auth bearer

delete.summary: Discard a private generated image @tag AI @auth bearer

get.summary: Stream AI action events @tag AI @auth bearer

post.summary: Promote a generated image into a Wiki asset @tag AI @auth bearer

get.summary: List AI models @tag AI Admin @auth bearer
List AI providers @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

get.summary: Get AI settings @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

patch.summary: Update AI settings @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

get.summary: AI usage statistics @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

put.summary: Assign AI purpose model @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

get.summary: Get user AI entitlement @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

put.summary: Update user AI entitlement @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

get.summary: Get AI index @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

delete.summary: Delete AI index @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

patch.summary: Update AI model @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

delete.summary: Delete AI model @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

patch.summary: Update AI provider @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

delete.description: Cascades through the provider's models, purpose assignments, index generations, and completed run records. Active runs prevent deletion.

Cancel building AI index @tag AI Admin @auth bearer @response 204
Retry AI index pages @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

Create manual AI model @tag AI Admin @auth bearer
Test AI provider @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

put.summary: Override AI model capability @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

delete.summary: Remove AI model capability override @tag AI Admin @auth bearer

get.summary: List system themes
get.description: Lists all system themes (built-ins + custom) and the active selection. Requires manage_appearance.

post.summary: Create a system theme
post.description: Copies an existing theme (typically a built-in) into a new editable custom row. Requires manage_appearance.

get.summary: Get site information
get.description: Returns the public site identity and footer settings.

put.description: Updates the site name and footer fields. Requires the manage_appearance capability.

get.summary: Get a system theme
get.description: Returns the full system theme (id, name, css, isBuiltin). Requires manage_appearance.

put.description: Updates a custom theme's name and/or CSS. Built-ins are read-only. Requires manage_appearance.

delete.description: Deletes a custom theme. Built-ins cannot be deleted. If the deleted theme was active, the active pointer is cleared. Requires manage_appearance.

put.description: Sets the active system theme. Pass null to clear the active selection. Requires manage_appearance.

get.summary: Get the caller's reading-theme tokens
get.description: Returns the per-user reading-theme tokens (or defaults if the user has not customized). Authenticated.

put.description: Replaces the per-user reading-theme tokens. Authenticated.

delete.summary: Reset the caller's reading-theme tokens to defaults
delete.description: Deletes the per-user row; subsequent reads return the static defaults. Authenticated.

get.summary: Get the site icon
get.description: Serves the configured site icon, or redirects to the shipped default.

put.description: Uploads a custom site icon (SVG/PNG/ICO). Requires the manage_appearance capability.

delete.description: Reverts the site icon to the shipped default. Requires the manage_appearance capability.

post.summary: Sign in
post.description: Authenticates with email and password and establishes a session.

post.summary: Sign out

get.summary: Get current user
get.description: Returns the currently authenticated session user, or null when anonymous.

post.summary: Register
post.description: Creates a new user account and establishes a session.

post.summary: Set my password
post.description: Allows a signed-in user to set a new password after an admin reset.

post.summary: Setup
post.description: Creates the first admin user when the wiki has no users yet.

post.summary: Render markdown preview
post.description: Renders the provided markdown source to HTML without persisting anything.

post.summary: Upload public wiki asset
post.description: Uploads an image asset and returns a Markdown-ready public reference.
